description: Search for or read a FHIR AllergyIntolerance resource. For direct read, provide _id alone. For search, provide patient or identifier. Use category to filter by food, medication, environment, or biologic. Use clinical-status to filter active, inactive, or resolved allergies.

searchParams._id: AllergyIntolerance resource ID — performs direct read when provided alone
searchParams.asserter: Source of the information (Patient, RelatedPerson, Practitioner)
searchParams.category: Allergy category: food, medication, environment, biologic
searchParams.last-date: Date of last known occurrence of a reaction
searchParams.manifestation: Clinical symptoms/signs associated with the event
searchParams.onset: Date of onset of the allergy or intolerance
